'''âp-ch-g''' ('''kapachag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knockdown|knockdown]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knockdown|knockdown]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-ch-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapachag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipachag|thipachag]] || [[word:jipachag|jipachag]] || [[word:shipachag|shipachag]] || [[word:kipachag|kipachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupachag|thuthupachag]] || [[word:jujupachag|jujupachag]] || [[word:shushupachag|shushupachag]] || [[word:kukupachag|kukupachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupachag|thupachag]] || [[word:jupachag|jupachag]] || [[word:shupachag|shupachag]] || [[word:kupachag|kupachag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupachag|thupachag]] || [[word:jupachag|jupachag]] || [[word:shupachag|shupachag]] || [[word:kupachag|kupachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepachag|thepachag]] || [[word:jepachag|jepachag]] || [[word:shepachag|shepachag]] || [[word:kepachag|kepachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopachag|thothopachag]] || [[word:jojopachag|jojopachag]] || [[word:shoshopachag|shoshopachag]] || [[word:kokopachag|kokopachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopachag|thopachag]] || [[word:jopachag|jopachag]] || [[word:shopachag|shopachag]] || [[word:kopachag|kopachag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopachag|thopachag]] || [[word:jopachag|jopachag]] || [[word:shopachag|shopachag]] || [[word:kopachag|kopachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpachag|thĂŠpachag]] || [[word:jĂŠpachag|jĂŠpachag]] || [[word:shĂŠpachag|shĂŠpachag]] || [[word:kĂŠpachag|kĂŠpachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapachag|thathapachag]] || [[word:jajapachag|jajapachag]] || [[word:shashapachag|shashapachag]] || [[word:kakapachag|kakapachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapachag|thapachag]] || [[word:japachag|japachag]] || [[word:shapachag|shapachag]] || [[word:kapachag|kapachag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapachag|thapachag]] || [[word:japachag|japachag]] || [[word:shapachag|shapachag]] || [[word:kapachag|kapachag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapachag|shapachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapachag|goshapachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapachag|gokishapachag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapachagnĂŒ|shapachagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapachagnknĂŒ|goshapachagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachagnĂŒ|gokishapachagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapachagshĂ«|shapachagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapachagnkshĂ«|goshapachagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapachagshĂ«|gokishapachagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachagro|shapachagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachagnkro|goshapachagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachagro|gokishapachagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachagmu|shapachagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachagnkmu|goshapachagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachagmu|gokishapachagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapachagsher|shapachagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapachagnksher|goshapachagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapachagsher|gokishapachagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapachagng|shapachagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapachagnkng|goshapachagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapachagng|gokishapachagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapachagya|shapachagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapachagnkya|goshapachagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapachagya|gokishapachagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapachagyam|shapachagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapachagnkyam|goshapachagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapachagyam|gokishapachagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachagnĂŒshĂ«|shapachagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapachagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapachagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachagnĂŒro|shapachagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachagnknĂŒro|goshapachagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachagnĂŒro|gokishapachagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachagnĂŒmu|shapachagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachagnknĂŒmu|goshapachagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachagnĂŒmu|gokishapachagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachagshĂ«nĂŒ|shapachagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapachagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapachagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachagshĂ«ro|shapachagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachagnkshĂ«ro|goshapachagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachagshĂ«ro|gokishapachagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachagshĂ«mu|shapachagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachagnkshĂ«mu|goshapachagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachagshĂ«mu|gokishapachagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachagronĂŒ|shapachagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachagnkronĂŒ|goshapachagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachagronĂŒ|gokishapachagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachagroshĂ«|shapachagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachagnkroshĂ«|goshapachagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachagroshĂ«|gokishapachagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapachagromu|shapachagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapachagnkromu|goshapachagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapachagromu|gokishapachagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapachagmunĂŒ|shapachagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapachagnkmunĂŒ|goshapachagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapachagmunĂŒ|gokishapachagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapachagmushĂ«|shapachagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapachagnkmushĂ«|goshapachagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapachagmushĂ«|gokishapachagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapachagmuro|shapachagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapachagnkmuro|goshapachagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapachagmuro|gokishapachagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
